---
title: "The Disturbing Element, or, Chronicles of the Blue-Bell Society"
sort_title: "Disturbing Element, or, Chronicles of the Blue-Bell Society"
year: 1878
subtitle: "1878"
slug: "disturbing element, or, chronicles of the Blue-Bell Society"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1878*



### **[Click here to reach the online text of](http://ia350631.us.archive.org/3/items/disturbingeleme00macqgoog/)**[*The Disturbing Element, or, Chronicles of the Blue-Bell Society*](http://ia350631.us.archive.org/3/items/disturbingeleme00macqgoog/)**  
in various formats, including PDF  
**

### **[Click here to download a PDF file of](http://ia350631.us.archive.org/3/items/disturbingeleme00macqgoog/disturbingeleme00macqgoog.pdf)**[*The Disturbing Element*](http://ia350631.us.archive.org/3/items/disturbingeleme00macqgoog/disturbingeleme00macqgoog.pdf)**  
(scan of a Stanford University Library copy)**
